name: Vernusylph of the Awakening Forests
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>と<ruby lang="jp"><rb>目</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>覚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>春</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Vernalizer Fairy of the Forests and Awakening
desc: You can discard this card, and 1 monster or "Vernusylph" card; send from your Deck to the GY, 1 EARTH monster that can be Normal Summoned/Set, then you can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster from your GY with a different name from that monster, also you cannot activate non-EARTH monster effects for the rest of this turn. You can target 1 "Vernusylph" monster you control; its ATK becomes doubled until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph of the Awakening Forests" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard this card, and 1 monster or "Vernusylph" card; send from your Deck to the GY, 1 EARTH monster that can be Normal Summoned/Set, then you can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster from your GY with a different name from that monster, also you cannot activate non-EARTH monster effects for the rest of this turn. You can target 1 "Vernusylph" monster you control; its ATK becomes doubled until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph of the Awakening Forests" once per turn.
eff: You can discard this card, and 1 monster or "Vernusylph" card; send from your Deck to the GY, 1 EARTH monster that can be Normal Summoned/Set, then you can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster from your GY with a different name from that monster, also you cannot activate non-EARTH monster effects for the rest of this turn. You can target 1 "Vernusylph" monster you control; its ATK becomes doubled until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph of the Awakening Forests" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
